content: We can reframe working memory capacity limits in AI agents not as a fixed hard constraint, but as a feature that can be adaptively regulated by the 2025 ICM curiosity mechanism: ICM will prioritize encoding novel, reasoning-relevant information into working memory while dropping predictable, low-value content to stay within the existing working memory capacity bound. This creates a self-tuning system where curiosity automatically optimizes the allocation of limited working memory space for high-quality reasoning.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
trigger_topic: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
